column4: Description

Open reflex sight with automatic reticle brightness adjustment and switching between 3 reticle types. 
Basic to apply and use.

Compact Micro H-1 reflex sight by Aimpoint was designed for use with any kind of firearms. 
Lightweight and easy to use.

Handgun Reflex Sight. 
Can be utilized by rifles, but to a questionable degree.
Compact Aimpoint designed for universal usage in all firearm builds.

Precision Optic designed to extremely rugged and operate continuously for up to 8 years using a single AA battery. 
Simple and effective as historically proven.

Russian made Reflex Sight popular among PMC companies and citizen shooter usage alike.
It was originally designed for Russian usage, but was never formally adapted.

Holographic Reflex Sight designed to be shot using both eyes as opposed to shooting with one.
Utilized often by US SOCOM forces on special operations.
Holographic Reflex Sight utilizing a magnifier for an additional magnification of 2x, to a range between 1x and 3x.

A 7x-35x Vision Scope for usage in Single-Shot Rifles such as Sniper Rifles or Marksmen Rifles. 
It features 3 zoom levels, being 7x, 16x, and 35x.

OKP sights that allow firing from unstable positions in rapidly changing conditions. 
Reduces the operator fatigue, and, if necessary, allows unhindered use of base mechanical sights.

Holographic Reflex Sight following similar origins to it's EOTech counterpart.
It's optic in particular is much easier on the eyes, being formed by dots rather than a solid shape.

Reflex Walther Multi-Reticle Point Sight features 2 dots and 2 reticles with adjustable brightness levels. 
Compact, but fragile and prone to malfunction

Digital Scope capable of switching between 1x and 4x ranges at user need. 
Has it's own set of ironsights atop the scope if needed in CQB Situations.

4x Assault Scope capable of mounting a PK-06 Reflex-Sight at the top. 
Allows the user to quickly switch between two ranges instead of having to switch magnifications.

Compact 2.5x prism scope manufactured by Primary Arms. 
It's optic is wide and allows for easy target acquistion without the expense of shooter fatigue.

A Long-range 20x Optic for utilization in Extreme Range Sniping. 
Highly impractical for most firearms save for Sniper Rifles.

A 3x-24x Rifle Scope that supports up to three magnifications, being 3x, 14x, and 24x. 
Generally easier to use in most firearms due to it's low inital magnification.
A 1x-6x Rifle Scope that can fit it's role either as a close quarters optic, or medium range scope.

A 3x-10x rifle scope with peculiar optical markings. 
Intended intially for the SV-98 platform, proper utilization of this optic can serve as a makeshift range-finder.

4x Assault Scope utilized by US Forces operating in foreign areas of operation. 
Extremely precise and stable to use, but feels a bit bulky at times.
1x to 6x Digital Scope designed by Valday to compete with the ELCAN. Clear Sight picture, and overall easy to utilize.

Compact prismatic scope with 2x magnification manufactured by Monstrum. 
Good for Close to Medium-ranged engagements.

Designed by Sig, 
The BRAVO4 4X30 optical scope sight features the uniquely large FOV for clear sight pictures and overall performance. 
Features a rail mount on the top for pistol optics.
Futuristic Holographic Sight design that allows for user target acquisation, without weighing the firearm down.

Compact and virtually non-existant weight wise, the FastFire Reflex sight provides a simple yet effective alternative to a weapons ironsight. 
It's also hard to destroy given it's size.

4x-32x Rifle Scope designed for shooting at small and medium distances. 
Features simple crosshair optic for the uninitiated.

column1: NcSTAR ADO P4 Sniper 3-9x42 Rifle Scope
column4:
A 3x-9x Digital Scope that comes with an Integrated Red Dot Sight at the top of the scope itself. 
A costly but versatile piece of equipment

Classic 3.0x Digital Scope no longer sold on the Civilian Market. 
Manufactured locally as per PMC Demands.

Russian made Holo-sight that continues to see service to this day. 
1.5x Magnification, utilizing a unique green reticle compared to other holographic sights.
Description
A classic Bipod designed for keeping weapon systems stable on a surface.

Angled Magpul Grip. Enables a more natural grip against the barrel axis.
Thanks to that, it reduces recoil and improves the weapon control.
Vertical Magpul Grip. Common, unsophisticated and inexpensive, it's design allows for shooter stability.

Integrates form with functionality. 
Its hybrid-designed shape works both as a regular foregrip and a comfortable hand stop for C-Clamp Operators.

Vertical Pistol Grip produced by Knights Armament.
Slightly long, but helps overall firearm performance.

Enables a more natural grip against the barrel axis.
Thanks to that, it reduces recoil and improves the weapon control.
Tactical device that combines laser designators in both visible and IR band with IR searchlight.

Steiner Dbal PL combined LED and green laser Weapon Light.
Sadly you cannot have both on at the same time.

column1: UTG Steel Dovetail Mount for AK Systems
column4:
(Free in slot, does not actually take up a slot, unless it is used without attaching an optic on it.) 
Simple Dovetail Mount for applicable AK platforms.
For utilization on most rail systems, it provides better operational control of weapon during fire at the cost of accuracy.

Easy to install, lightweight and compact frontgrip, for those wanting a CQB Firearm Setup.
Only available to AR-15 Platforms.

Angled Magpul Grip. Enables a more natural grip against the barrel axis.
Thanks to that, it reduces recoil and improves the weapon control.
Only applicable to firearms with MLOKs.

Extremely lightweight tactical grip made from light alloy.
Allows for more freedom in terms of user carry weight.

Grip allows you to handle the weapon with confidence. 
The organic design enables the operator to manipulate the rifle in a comfortable way.

column1: Tango Down Stubby BGV-MK46K Tac Grip
column4:
Short grip for use with weapons of close and extra close quarters combat.
Ideally fits assault shotguns.

ATPIAL (Advanced Target Pointer Illuminator Aiming Laser)
Combines Laser Designators in both visble and IR Band with IR Searchlights. 
The lifespan on this is greatly superior.

Holosun LS321 is a multi-laser tactical device with green laser in the visible light spectrum, IR laser and IR searchlight.
Extremely Bulky.
Underbarrel-mounted LED flashlight "2P Klesch + LCU" produced by Zenit for utilization in Handguns and Sub-Machine Guns.

column1: Zenit B-33 Dust Cover for AK Systems
column4:
Dustcover that has an integrated rail on it for usage in AK Systems.
Enables ALL AKs to mount optics on the dustcover for ease of optic access.

A single-shot 40mm underbarrel grenade launcher, 
Designed for installation on numerous Underbarreled Pictanny Rails.

An Underbarrel Grenade Launcher for 40mm VOG-25 Grenades.
Designed for Installation on AK Platforms without Under-Rail Modularity.
Lightweight aluminium tactical grip that allows for more accurate shots and easy target acquistional snaps.
Simple but powerful LED flashlight with a sturdy body.

column1: Glock Tactical GL21 Flashlight with Laser
column4:
Underbarrel-mounted LED flashlight with a laser aiming module produced by Glock. 
For specifc utilization by Glocks.

Tactical Device that has been improved on by the years.
Best in the field, and it runs on special solar powered batteries, enabling no downtime between days or weeks on end.

Slim Tactical Device used primarily in Night Raids.
It's placement will balance out the firearm so long as it's placed on the side or top rails of a given firearm.
Description
Muzzle Break used and designed for both 7.62 and 5.45 AK-Based Weapon Systems
Standard Izhmash-produced muzzle brake and compensator for AK74 and Systems developed from it.

The 5.56x45 Colt USGI A2 Flash hider a.k.a. Bird Cage is designed for mounting on 5.56x45 weapons built on AR-15 system.
Currently in service for the M4A1 Platform.
PWS CQB muzzle brake is designed specifically for compact arms and use in confined spaces.
Illusion 9 is a compact, high performance silencer for modern 9mm semi-automatic pistols.
SRD 9 is a sound suppressor made by Sig. For 9mm utilization.

AK-74 shot sound suppressor from the Hexagon company.
As you may imagine, only serviceable to 5.45x39 AK Weapon Systems.

Light sound suppressor made by SilencerCo.
Known to many as a Monolith of a Supressor for it's rectangle design.

Izhmash-produced sound suppressing device for Vityaz SMG of previous generations.
For Vityaz-SN exclusive use.

Light sound suppressor made by SilencerCo.
Known to many as a Monolith of a Supressor for it's rectangle design.
This one supports .45 ACP.

KAC QDSS NT-4 5.56x45 and .223 silencer, can only be installed on compatible KAC muzzle devices. 
(Notably for the AR-15 Platform. Also comes with it.)

column1:
Gemtech SFN-57 Suppressor + 
Threaded Barrel Conversion
column4:
The SFN-57 is a compact, high performance sound suppressor for the modern day Five-Seven Handgun. 
Comes with a Threaded Barrel with it's installation.

Converts the Standard DSR-1 to a Subsonic Varient.
The barrel length is reduced down to a 310mm, with a adaptation to the inner rifling of the rifle's internals.
The result is a bullet velocity traveling below the speed of sound at an approx. 340 m/s (1,100 ft/s)

7.62x51 mm Sound Suppressor for use in most modern day 7.62x51mm Rifles. 
Utilizing a special made muzzle converter, you can now use this with other rifles!
*Results may vary.

Surefire SOCOM556-MONSTER 5.56x45 and .223 silencer. 
Can only be installed on compatible Surefire muzzle devices. (It comes with it.)

Rotex 2 is a 4.6x30 mm suppressor produced by Brügger & Thomet.
Can only specifically be utilized on the MP7A1 and A2.

column1: Daniel Defence Wave QD Sound Suppressor
column4:
Daniel Defence Wave QD sound suppressor, utilized by several American Units. 
Which can be installed over a Wave muzzle brake. (It comes with it.)

Sound Moderator created by SilencerCo for use in 12 Gauge Shotguns.
Comes with it's required adapter mount.
Also Uniformly Rectangle, which is a bit weird for aesthetic sake.

The PBS-4 silencer manufactured by TSNIITochMash.
Made for use as part of the "Canary" assault rifle grenade launcher system. 
AK Platform only.

Rotor 43 muzzle brake, is designed for installation on AK 7.62x39.
Although positioned as muzzle brake, it also works as a sound supressor.

PBS-1 is a device manufactured by TSNIITochmash
Developed for noiseless and flash-free fire with 7.62mm modernized Kalashnikov.
Description
Izhmash polymer pistol grip for AK and compatibles, designed to replace the old bakelite grip.

A bakelite Izhmash pistol grip for AK compatible weapons. 
Originally installed on AKM and AKMS. Tried and Tested after a century worth of conflict.

ECS polymer pistol grip can be installed at any weapon compatible with AR-15 grips.
This one colored in Tan.

RK-3 Classica anatomic pistol grip features built-in hermetically sealed battery storage compartment.
Designed for installation as replacement of standard AK pistol grip.

Polymer Magpul MOE (Magpul Original Equipment) pistol grip
Can be installed on any weapon compatible with AR-15 pistol grips.

Anatomical pistol grip inspired by M249 SAW LMG grip.
Comes in black and flat dark earth.
